**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the annoyance or gap, ideally from a real gym session.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways this could work, if any.

**Note:** Skrot stays offline (no accounts, no cloud, no social features) —
requests in that direction will be closed.
